name: GoalOS Signoff Pro — Action Graph & Human Authority Lab

scenarios.label: AI research acceptance
scenarios.objective: Turn a persuasive research brief into an inspectable decision and scoped next actions.

scenarios.label: Software delivery review
scenarios.objective: Move an AI-generated implementation package from output to release-ready review actions.

scenarios.label: Procurement proof room
scenarios.objective: Convert vendor claims into reviewable procurement actions without exposing private context.
scenarios.decision: escalate to human buyer with claim-bound summary

scenarios.label: Safety escalation package
scenarios.objective: Convert a sensitive AI work package into an action graph with no autonomous external action.
scenarios.decision: hold external action until designated authority signs
